output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?hotel ?name WHERE {
  ?hotel wdt:P31 wd:Q132184 .
  ?hotel wdt:P1168 ?rooms .
  FILTER(?rooms >= 2000)
  .
  ?hotel rdfs:label ?name .
  FILTER(LANG(?name) = "en")
}
output.answer: The hotels with at least 2000 rooms include the Burj Al Arab (Q517200), which has exactly 2000 rooms.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?hotel ?name WHERE {
  ?hotel wdt:P31 wd:Q132184 .
  ?hotel wdt:P1168 ?rooms .
  FILTER(?rooms >= 2000)
  .
  ?hotel rdfs:label ?name .
  FILTER(LANG(?name) = "en")
}
```
